completions.label: Console.Write
completions.detail: Write to standard output without newline

completions.label: Console.ReadKey
completions.detail: Read a key press from input

documentation.value:
Declares an enumeration type consisting of a set of named constants.

```csharp
public enum Status
{
    Active,
    Inactive,
    Pending
}
```

completions.label: yield return
completions.detail: Yield a value in an iterator

completions.label: string.IsNullOrEmpty
completions.detail: Check if string is null or empty

completions.label: string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace
completions.detail: Check if string is null, empty, or whitespace

completions.label: .Split()
completions.detail: Split a string into an array

documentation.value:
Correlates elements of two sequences based on matching keys.

```csharp
var result = orders.Join(customers,
    o => o.CustomerId,
    c => c.Id,
    (o, c) => new { o.OrderId, c.Name });
```

completions.label: .FirstOrDefault()
completions.detail: LINQ: Get first element or default

completions.label: .SingleOrDefault()
completions.detail: LINQ: Get the only element or default

documentation.value:
Returns the only element, or a default value if no elements exist. Throws if more than one element.

```csharp
var item = items.SingleOrDefault(x => x.Id == id);
```

completions.label: .Any()
completions.detail: LINQ: Check if any elements match

completions.label: .All()
completions.detail: LINQ: Check if all elements match

documentation.value:
Creates a task that completes after a specified time delay.

```csharp
await Task.Delay(1000); // 1 second
await Task.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(5));
```

completions.label: Math.Max
completions.detail: Return the larger of two values

completions.label: Math.Min
completions.detail: Return the smaller of two values

documentation.value:
Returns the absolute value of a specified number.

```csharp
int abs = Math.Abs(-5); // 5
double d = Math.Abs(-3.14); // 3.14
```

Returns the square root of a specified number.

```csharp
double root = Math.Sqrt(25); // 5.0
double hyp = Math.Sqrt(a*a + b*b);
```

completions.label: Math.Pow
completions.detail: Return a number raised to a power

documentation.value:
Returns a specified number raised to the specified power.

```csharp
double result = Math.Pow(2, 10); // 1024
double cube = Math.Pow(x, 3);
```

Rounds a value to the nearest integer or specified number of decimal places.

```csharp
double r = Math.Round(3.456, 2); // 3.46
int n = (int)Math.Round(3.7); // 4
```

Returns the largest integral value less than or equal to the specified number.

```csharp
double f = Math.Floor(3.7); // 3.0
double neg = Math.Floor(-3.2); // -4.0
```

Returns the smallest integral value greater than or equal to the specified number.

```csharp
double c = Math.Ceiling(3.2); // 4.0
double neg = Math.Ceiling(-3.7); // -3.0
```

completions.label: int.TryParse
completions.detail: Try to parse string to integer

documentation.value:
Converts a specified value to a 32-bit signed integer.

```csharp
int n = Convert.ToInt32("42");
int d = Convert.ToInt32(3.99); // 4
int b = Convert.ToInt32(true); // 1
```

completions.label: DateTime.Now
completions.detail: Get current local date and time

completions.label: DateTime.UtcNow
completions.detail: Get current UTC date and time

documentation.value:
Generates a sequence of integral numbers within a specified range.

```csharp
var nums = Enumerable.Range(0, 10); // 0..9
var squares = Enumerable.Range(1, 5).Select(x => x * x);
```
